_comment: Walk-forward book freeze-stamp (v2.5 bake 2026-07-05, DPP-strip final consolidation). The book (s4 matrix) is id(p)-keyed, so raw-file sha256 is non-deterministic across regenerations BY DESIGN; identity is sealed on the STABLE keys (player,type,year,pick), canonicalised. ship_gates_check.py B3 compares the current S4_MATRIX stable-key sha to this baseline.
sealed_by: v2.5 bake (DPP strip final consolidation: two position fields, the 34, Kako fix, off-by-one, four single-source guards)
